docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY ENEVOLDSEN, EUGENIA AS TO DEFENDANT LOEBENSTEIN, AL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. LETTER TO AL LOEBENSTEIN RETURNED UNCLAIMED.

INVALID SERVICE AS TO AL LOEBENSTEIN, NO INFOR- MATION ABOUT SERVICE ON POS.

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $208.50 FILED BY LOEBENSTEIN, AL AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ENEVOLDSEN, EUGENIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENEVOLDSEN, EUGENIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOEBENSTEIN, AL DEF TO RETURN COAT TO PLFT WITHIN 2 WEEKS. BY 11/15/93. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LOEBENSTEIN, AL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ENEVOLDSEN, EUGENIA DEFECT IN SERVICE WAIVED ON CROSS-COMPLAINT BY PLFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
